scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w apps/server && npm run build -w apps/client
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm test && npm run format:check
scripts.clean: node -e "for (const p of ['dist','apps/server/dist','apps/client/dist','packages/shared/dist']) fs.rmSync(p, { recursive: true, force: true })"
scripts.reset:deps: npm run clean:modules && npm run clean:lock && npm install
